The '''Foerost campaign''' took place in [[20 BBY/Legends|20.1 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], which ultimately decided who would control the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
The large [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]]-held [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] of Foerost had been [[Foerost Siege|blockaded]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] since the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|beginning]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]], to ensure that the [[Factory/Legends|factories]] there would atrophy, being severed from the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] supply line.

Almost two full [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] was initiated, Techno Union [[Engineer/Legends|engineers]] emerged from the [[Star system/Legends|system]] with their newest weapon: the [[Bulwark Mark I]] [[Battlecruiser/Legends|battlecruiser]], a [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometer]]-long metal behemoth that rammed through the Republic ships with ease. Bristling with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], and significant [[Armor/Legends|armor]], the [[Bulwark Fleet]] smashed outposts all through [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Imperial Center Oversector|Sector Zero]] with impunity, aged [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Dua Ningo/Legends|Dua Ningo]] leading the way.

In the face of such reckless hate, the Republic's hand was forced; they debuted their newest ship, the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]], half a year ahead of schedule. Led by young [[Captain/Legends|Captains]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] and [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]], the [[Victory Fleet]] fought valiantly in battles at [[Ixtlar/Legends|Ixtlar]], [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]], and [[Basilisk]]; however, Ningo and the Bulwark Fleet remained intact.

The final battle in the Foerost conflict came to an end above [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]], where the Bulwark Fleet was finally destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
The Foerost campaign was created by [[Daniel Wallace|Dan Wallace]] specifically for ''The New Essential Chronology'' to explain the origins of the ''Bulwark'' battlecruisers from [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']].
